name: part_007
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_007.webm

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco and Aki Rosenthal perform 'Adult-ish' (大人だもん。) on stage with a starry city background.
speakers: アキ・ローゼンタール

scenes.description: The scene transitions with audience applause and a shot of a giant birthday cake. A curtain rises to reveal a silhouette.
Robocosan is revealed behind the curtain. She and Yuzuki Choco perform 'chocolate box' on a candy-themed stage.

subtitles.original: 大人だもん。
subtitles.english: Adult-ish

subtitles.original: 別の人に落ちちゃう
subtitles.english: I'll fall for someone else

subtitles.original: 街の風は少し冷たい
subtitles.english: The city wind is a little cold

subtitles.original: 慣れないワイン 無理やり飲み干してしまっては
subtitles.english: Forcing down wine I'm not used to...

subtitles.original: フラ、フワ
subtitles.english: Dizzy and lightheaded

subtitles.original: 嫌われちゃったらどうしよう
subtitles.english: What if you end up hating me?

subtitles.original: 下手しちゃったらどうしよう
subtitles.english: What if I mess things up?

subtitles.original: 少しの弱音もこぼしたくない
subtitles.english: I don't want to show any weakness

subtitles.original: ちょっと期待してね
subtitles.english: Expect a little from me

subtitles.original: ずっと見栄張ってね
subtitles.english: Keep putting on a front

subtitles.original: まわりばかり気にして生きてる
subtitles.english: Living while only caring about what's around

subtitles.original: ちょっと優越感
subtitles.english: A bit of superiority

subtitles.original: でもなんか寂しくてあぁ
subtitles.english: But somehow I'm lonely, ah

subtitles.original: 本当の自分じゃない気がして
subtitles.english: Feeling like it's not the real me

subtitles.original: いつもわかったふりして
subtitles.english: Always pretending to understand

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃないのに無理して
subtitles.english: Pushing myself even though it's not like that

subtitles.original: 味のしないキスでも
subtitles.english: Even with a tasteless kiss

subtitles.original: 100倍一番嬉しくて
subtitles.english: I'm a hundred times more happy

subtitles.original: 取り繕った私は 可愛いかな？
subtitles.english: Is the fabricated me cute?

subtitles.original: 今夜は壊れるほど 抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Hold me tonight until I break

subtitles.original: 今にも切れそうな 糸で繋がってる恋だね
subtitles.english: It's a love connected by a thread about to break

subtitles.original: 私が諦めたら きっと簡単に消えちゃうね
subtitles.english: If I give up, it'll surely disappear easily

subtitles.original: 引き留めるにはどうする？
subtitles.english: How can I make you stay?

subtitles.original: ああ、不満だったらどうする？
subtitles.english: Ah, what if you're dissatisfied?

subtitles.original: 不器用に指を絡めて
subtitles.english: Clumsily intertwining our fingers

subtitles.original: いつもチェックしてね
subtitles.english: Always check on me

subtitles.original: 息苦しくしてね
subtitles.english: Make it stifling

subtitles.original: 他の娘と比べてばっかりだ
subtitles.english: You're always comparing me to other girls

subtitles.original: 一番見てほしい ああ
subtitles.english: I want you to look at me most, ah

subtitles.original: 目の前のあなたは
subtitles.english: You, right in front of me

subtitles.original: どこか違う景色見てる
subtitles.english: Are looking at some other scenery

subtitles.original: いつも優しいふりして
subtitles.english: Always pretending to be kind

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃないのに笑って
subtitles.english: Smiling even though it's not like that

subtitles.original: 近づけば近づくほど
subtitles.english: The closer I get

subtitles.original: 孤独はドクドク満ちて
subtitles.english: The more loneliness fills me up

subtitles.original: 少しずつ離れて 言葉わかるよ
subtitles.english: Bit by bit we drift apart, I understand the words

subtitles.original: 今夜は忘れるほど 抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Hold me tonight until I forget

subtitles.original: 自分はもっと強く なればさよなら
subtitles.english: If I become stronger, then goodbye...

subtitles.original: 殻を言えるのにな
subtitles.english: I could say it to the shell

subtitles.original: いつもわかったふりして
subtitles.english: Always pretending to understand

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃないのに無理して
subtitles.english: Pushing myself even though it's not like that

subtitles.original: ふと見せる優しさが ずっと忘れられなくて
subtitles.english: The kindness you occasionally show, I can't ever forget it

subtitles.original: 取り繕った私は 可愛いかな？
subtitles.english: Is the fabricated me cute?

subtitles.original: 今夜は壊れるほど 抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Hold me tonight until I break

subtitles.original: とうとう溢れだした目 私は頑張ったよね
subtitles.english: Finally, my eyes overflowed, I worked hard, didn't I?

subtitles.original: いつか振り向いてくれると 思っていた もういいから
subtitles.english: I thought you'd look my way someday, but it's enough now

subtitles.original: 取り繕った私は 泣かせゆく
subtitles.english: I'll let the fabricated me cry

subtitles.original: 今夜は忘れるほど 抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Hold me tonight until I forget

chocolate box

subtitles.english:
chocolate box
Lyrics/Composition: dezzy (Hifumi)

subtitles.original: なんかいつも眠そうだし
subtitles.english: You always seem so sleepy

subtitles.original: なんかいつもつまんなそうだし
subtitles.english: You always seem so bored

subtitles.original: なんかいつもヤバそうだし
subtitles.english: You always seem like you're in trouble

subtitles.original: なんかいつもスマホ弄ってるし
subtitles.english: You're always fiddling with your phone

subtitles.original: 本当はテンション高いのに
subtitles.english: You're usually high energy

subtitles.original: 私といる時だけ低いし
subtitles.english: But it's only low when you're with me

subtitles.original: なんか自分ありえなくない？
subtitles.english: Isn't that just unbelievable?

subtitles.original: 嫌い大嫌い どうでもいい
subtitles.english: I hate you, I hate you, I don't care anymore

subtitles.original: だったら僕も言うけどさ
subtitles.english: Well, I've got things to say too

subtitles.original: ちっちゃいことですぐ怒るし
subtitles.english: You get mad at the smallest things

subtitles.original: 怒ったらずっと泣くし
subtitles.english: Once you're mad, you cry forever

subtitles.original: 「ごめん」って言っても許してくれないし
subtitles.english: Even if I say "sorry," you won't forgive me

subtitles.original: その割にヤツが空けば
subtitles.english: But on the other hand, if there's a gap

subtitles.original: 「結婚しようよ」とか言うし
subtitles.english: You say things like "Let's get married"

subtitles.original: ああ なんて罪深い人なんだ
subtitles.english: Ah, what a sinful person

subtitles.original: ちくしょう もう知らないぞ
subtitles.english: Dammit, I'm done with you

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い恋の魔法は
subtitles.english: The sweet, sweet magic of love is

subtitles.original: 苦味の秘密のチョコレート
subtitles.english: The secret chocolate of bitterness

subtitles.original: 二人だけ...
subtitles.english: Only for the two of us...
